title: ccdl2deltalake Mapping
description: Array of mapping entries used by MappingContext to resolve CCDL concepts to Trino table/column paths.

primaryRefPath.description: Dot-path in the primary table pointing to the joined resource reference (e.g. 'medicationreference.reference')

secondaryIdPath.description: Dot-path in the joined table holding the resource ID (e.g. 'id_versioned')

path.description: Dot-path to the coding array that holds the term code (e.g. 'code.coding')

join.description: Optional cross-table join for codes stored in a separate resource (e.g. Medication)

valueField.description: Field name for the numeric value within the struct (e.g. 'value')

unitCodeField.description: Field name for the unit code within the struct (e.g. 'code')

path.description: Dot-path to the scalar coding struct (e.g. 'valuecodeableconcept.coding')
Dot-path to the birth date field used to compute age

ValueFilter.description: Discriminated union on 'type'. Describes where and how to find the clinical value for comparisons.

type.description: DATE wraps the column with DATE(); DATETIME wraps it with FROM_ISO8601_TIMESTAMP()

attributeCode.description: Concept identifying this attribute in CCDL queries

type.description: Value type for comparisons; omit for concept-only attributes

valueField.description: Field name for the numeric value (required when type is QUANTITY)

unitCodeField.description: Field name for the unit code (required when type is QUANTITY)

attributeCode.description: Concept identifying this attribute in CCDL queries

extensionArrayPath.description: Dot-path to an extension array when the reference is encoded as an extension

extensionUrl.description: Extension URL used to select the correct extension element

context.description: CCDL context code that scopes this mapping (e.g. 'Diagnose')

key.description: Clinical concept this entry maps (e.g. SNOMED 37796009)

tableName.description: Trino table name (without catalog/schema prefix, e.g. 'condition')

patientRefPath.description: Dot-path to the patient reference column (e.g. 'subject.reference')

termCodeFilter.description: Location of the coding array used to filter by concept code

valueFilter.description: Location and type of the clinical value used for numeric/coded comparisons

dateFilter.description: Location and type of the date column used for time restrictions

simpleAttributeFilters.description: Scalar or quantity attribute filters (e.g. body weight)
